## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation you are trying to solve. Ex: "It is difficult to..."

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional context

Mockups, examples from other tools, or links that illustrate the request.
